utterance:
{
  "utterance": "Our project, 'EcoGuardian', is a comprehensive platform that uses AI to monitor and mitigate environmental pollution in real-time, ensuring clean air and water for communities worldwide.",
  "title": "EcoGuardian",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "EcoGuardian leverages cutting-edge AI to provide actionable insights and solutions for environmental issues, making it a unique and impactful social impact project.",
  "your_role": "PM and Presenter"
}

{
  "utterance": "Our project, 'WallSpeak', will transform urban walls into a platform for anonymous social commentary, empowering voices to be heard without fear of reprisal.",
  "title": "WallSpeak",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "By leveraging augmented reality and graffiti technology, WallSpeak turns the urban landscape into a living canvas for social change, addressing issues like free speech and community engagement.",
  "your_role": "pm_visionary"
}

{
  "utterance": "Transforming urban waste into sustainable energy through smart city integration and community engagement.",
  "title": "EcoSpark",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "EcoSpark leverages AI to convert waste into energy, providing a scalable and measurable solution to reduce urban waste while generating renewable energy. The platform incentivizes community participation through gamification, ensuring broad adoption and measurable social impact.",
  "your_role": "PM/Visionary"
}

{
  "utterance": "Transform everyday objects into interactive experiences with the 'Objectify' app, where users can scan any item and unlock personalized stories, virtual try-ons, and community interactions. It’s the future of retail and engagement, all wrapped in a sleek, user-friendly interface.",
  "title": "Objectify",
  "track": "T02",
  "core_insight": "Objectify uniquely combines augmented reality with retail experiences, offering a novel way to interact with physical products and fostering community engagement through storytelling and virtual try-ons.",
  "your_role": "Presenter / Demo"
}
